title: Better Ping Display [Forge/NeoForge]
description: Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list
body:
# Better Ping Display - Forge/NeoForge Edition

_This is a Forge mod. For the Fabric version of this mod, click [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)._


A mod for Minecraft to display each player's ping in the player list as a number. There is also a config file
for changing the text color and format (available for Minecraft 1.12+ only).

![](https://vladmarica.com/assets/minecraft/better-ping-display.png)

This is a client-side mod. The server doesn't need to have it installed. It works even when playing on vanilla servers.

### Configuration

See https://github.com/vladmarica/better-ping-display#configuration for an explanation of what the various config options do.
